top_findings.summary: The skill requests Bash(*) (allowing arbitrary command execution) and WebFetch (allowing arbitrary web requests), which are excessive for a statistical analysis tool that primarily performs local calculations and generates charts. The skill's core functionality—creating control charts and detecting special causes—does not require arbitrary system command execution or external network requests. While data reading/writing is necessary, unrestricted Bash access and web fetching pose unnecessary security risks and are not justified by the stated purpose.
